zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert de Southworth於1270年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾卡芙特 煙雨 素沃斯時，他的父親Gilbert de Sotheworth40歲，母親Emma de Sefton41歲。他於1295年與Cecily D'Ewyas結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1323年在英國藍卡爾素沃斯被列為sheriff of southworth。他去世於大約1329年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾素沃斯享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert de Southworth于1270年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾卡芙特 煙雨 素沃斯时，他的父亲Gilbert de Sotheworth40岁，母亲Emma de Sefton41岁。他于1295年与Cecily D'Ewyas结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1323年在英国藍卡爾素沃斯被列为sheriff of southworth。他去世于大约1329年在英国英格兰藍卡爾素沃斯享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Southworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Southworth in Winwick (Lancashire), from Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Suthard
meanings: English: variant of   Southworth  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Southwood
meanings: habitational name from one or more of several places in southern England, especially in Devon, named with Middle English bi southe wode ‘(place) to the south of the wood’.

habitational name from one or more minor places called Southwood or Sowood, from Middle English south(e) + wode ‘south wood’. Sowood in Osset (Yorkshire) is the most likely source of the Yorkshire name. There may have been confusion with Southworth .

variants.name: Sudduth
meanings: English: variant of   Southworth  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert de Southworth was born in 1270, in Croft with Southworth, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Gilbert de Sotheworth, was 40 and his mother, Emma de Sefton, was 41. He married Cecily D'Ewyas in 1295. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. In 1323, his occupation is listed as sheriff of southworth in Southworth, Lancashire, England. He died about 1329, in Southworth, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.Croft with Southworth, Lancashire, Engla: Croft with Southworth, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert de Southworth est né en 1270, à Croft with Southworth, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gilbert de Sotheworth, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Emma de Sefton, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Cecily D'Ewyas en 1295. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. En 1323, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of southworth à Southworth, Lancashire, Angleterre. Il est décédé environ 1329, à Southworth, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.Croft with Southworth, Lancashire, Engla: Croft with Southworth, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert de Southworth 1270 in Croft with Southworth, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert de Sotheworth 40 und seine Mutter Emma de Sefton 41. Er hat 1295 Cecily D'Ewyas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1323 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of southworth in Southworth, Lancashire, England aufgeführt. Er starb um 1329 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Southworth, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Southworth è nato il nel 1270 nel Croft with Southworth, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gilbert de Sotheworth, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Emma de Sefton, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Cecily D'Ewyas nel 1295. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1323, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of southworth nel Southworth, Lancashire, England. Morì circa 1329, nel Southworth, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ko.Croft with Southworth, Lancashire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 크로프트 위스 소우스워스
ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Southworth(이)가 1270년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 크로프트 위스 소우스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert de Sotheworth(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Sefton(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1295년 Cecily D'Ewyas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1323년, 그의 직업은 영국 랭카실르 소우스워스에서 sheriff of southworth이었다. 그는 대략 1329년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 소우스워스에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Southworth nasceu em 1270, em Croft with Southworth, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gilbert de Sotheworth, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Sefton, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecily D'Ewyas em 1295. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1323, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of southworth em Southworth, Lancashire, Inglaterra. ru.Croft with Southworth, Lancashire, Engla: крофт вит соутворт, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert de Southworth родился в 1270 г. в местности крофт вит соутворт, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gilbert de Sotheworth было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de Sefton, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecily D'Ewyas в 1295 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. В 1323 году он работал по профессии sheriff of southworth в местности соутворт, ланкашир, Англия. Он умер около 1329 г. в местности соутворт, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

Se casó con Cecily D'Ewyas en 1295. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. En 1323, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of southworth en Southworth, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
